name: Security Review Panel
description: Reviews delivery security readiness and emits an aggregate panel state through a moderator.

members.responsibility: Aggregate reviewer state without injecting content judgment.

entry_conditions: Security-sensitive changes are present or security review is required by policy
workflow: Security reviewer evaluates artifacts and emits findings.
Moderator determines whether the panel is complete and what aggregate state it should emit.
moderation_rule: The moderator may emit approve, conditional, or block at the panel-state level only. It must not originate security findings.
rework_routing: Security blocks route back to the originating pod.
